description: Sector overlay for healthcare providers, health facilities, medical professionals, health insurance, health data, clinical services, and regulated health-sector documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Health. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Public Health Act, 2012 (Act 851)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Ministry of Health / FDA Ghana

primary_sources.name: Ghana Health Service and Teaching Hospitals Act, 1996 (Act 525)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Ghana Health Service

primary_sources.name: Health Professions Regulatory Bodies Act, 2013 (Act 857)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Health professional councils

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

rules.title: Patient confidentiality and health-record privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient confidentiality, medical records, health information privacy, consent, or sensitive data evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Health professional registration or licensing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Medical and Dental Council, Nursing and Midwifery Council, Pharmacy Council, Allied Health, or professional registration evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Health facility governance or Ghana Health Service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Ghana Health Service, teaching hospital, facility governance, institutional policy, or health service standards evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Ghana Health Service and Teaching Hospitals Act, 1996 (Act 525)

rules.title: NHIA accreditation, claims, or health-insurance evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for NHIA, National Health Insurance Scheme, provider accreditation, claims, or private health insurance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: FDA regulated health-product or clinical-trial evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for FDA Ghana, drug registration, medical device, clinical trial, product approval, or regulated-product evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
